dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Important Dosage and Administration Instructions Pentazocine and Naloxone Tablets should be prescribed only by healthcare professionals who are knowledgeable about the use of opioids and how to mitigate the associated risks. Use the lowest effective dosage for the shortest duration of time consistent with individual patient treatment goals [see Warnings and Precautions ] .
